caribbean.headline: Caribbean Weather Alert
caribbean.paragraph: San Juan is experiencing 83% rain probability with winds of 15 kt and wave heights of 3.8 ft, while Martinique has a less than 10% rain probability is not applicable as the given data for Martinique has lower wind and no given rain data, however, its max wind is 13 kt. I am monitoring these conditions closely as they may impact port operations in the Eastern Caribbean and Lesser Antilles.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Storm Hits Cadiz
mediterranean.paragraph: Cadiz is experiencing 100% rain probability with strong winds of 22 kt and significant wave heights of 7.7 ft, while Lisbon is seeing less severe conditions with winds of 14 kt. I expect the rough seas and high winds in Cadiz to impact port operations, with the dominant swell direction from the WSW and a swell period of 14 s.
